---
title : "Logistic Separable"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: zephyr
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg; Pkg.activate(".."); Pkg.status()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Statistics, Random, LinearAlgebra
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
# separable data
Random.seed!(1)
d = 2
n = 100
y = [ones(n ÷ 2); -ones(n ÷ 2)]
X = [
    -ones(n ÷ 2, 1) -ones(n ÷ 2, 1);
    ones(n ÷ 2, 1) ones(n ÷ 2, 1)
    ] .+ randn(n, 2) ./ 2

X_ext = [X ones(n)]
d = d + 1
L = opnorm(X_ext)^2 / n
w = randn(d)
w[end] = 0.0

# GD
maxiter = 100000
ws = zeros(d, maxiter)
functionerror = zeros(maxiter)
functionval = zeros(maxiter)

for iter in 1:maxiter
    ws[:, iter] = w
    functionerror[iter] = mean(y .* (X_ext * w) .< 0)
    functionval[iter] = mean(log.(1 .+ exp.(-y .* (X_ext * w))))
    temp = (X_ext * w) .* y
    grad = (1 / n) * X_ext' * (y .* (-1 ./ (1 .+ exp.(temp))))
    global w = w - (1 / L) * grad
end
```

```{julia}
itertoplot = round.(Int, 2 .^ (0.5:0.5:9))
fig = Figure(size=(1200, 600))
for (i, it) in enumerate(itertoplot)
    row = (i - 1) ÷ 6 + 1
    col = (i - 1) % 6 + 1
    ax = Axis(
        fig[row, col],
        title="t = $it",
        limits=(-4, 4, -4, 4),
        xticklabelsvisible=false,
        yticklabelsvisible=false,
        xticksvisible=false,
        yticksvisible=false
    )

    scatter!(
        ax, X[y .== 1, 1], X[y .== 1, 2],
        marker=:cross, color=blue, markersize=10
    )
    scatter!(
        ax, X[y .== -1, 1], X[y .== -1, 2],
        marker=:cross, color=red, markersize=10
    )

    Xleft, Xright = -10.0, 10.0

    # Boundary at current iter
    Yleft = -(ws[3, it] + Xleft * ws[1, it]) / ws[2, it]
    Yright = -(ws[3, it] + Xright * ws[1, it]) / ws[2, it]
    lines!(ax, [Xleft, Xright], [Yleft, Yright], color=:black, linewidth=2)

    # Boundary at end
    Yleft_end = -(ws[3, end] + Xleft * ws[1, end]) / ws[2, end]
    Yright_end = -(ws[3, end] + Xright * ws[1, end]) / ws[2, end]
    lines!(
        ax, [Xleft, Xright], [Yleft_end, Yright_end],
        color=:black, linestyle=:dot, linewidth=2
    )
end

fig
```
